questions.question: Explain the concept of vanishing gradients in neural networks and how it affects optimization. Provide a solution to overcome this challenge.
Describe the difference between batch normalization and weight normalization. Which one is more commonly used in deep neural networks? Justify your answer.

An actor-critic method is used to solve a Markov decision process. What are the advantages and disadvantages of this method? Explain how it can be optimized using techniques such as value function approximation.
